summary: Aviation Liability insurance covering airline and general aviation operators for third-party bodily injury, property damage, and passenger liability. Compulsory under EC Regulation 785/2004 and Montreal Convention limits.

schemaEntities.description: Aviation operator entity. Custom: AOC_Reference, OperatorCategory, SeatCapacity, AnnualFlightHours, RouteNetwork, IATA_Membership, EC785_MinLimit, MontrealConventionStatus.
86 rules: EC Reg 785/2004 minimum limit compliance, Montreal Convention SDR calculation, AOC validity checks, seat capacity-based limit adequacy, route network war risk premium loading.

relationships.note: Passenger limit adequacy checked against seat capacity and EC785 minimums
AOC and regulatory limit rules are mandatory compliance checks

migrationIssues.detail: EC Regulation 785/2004 minimum limit calculation based on MTOW and seat capacity. GW Cloud validation rules can accommodate but SDR-based limit calculation requires custom rule.
Special Drawing Rights (SDR) conversion for Montreal Convention limits requires daily IMF exchange rate feed. No GW Cloud native SDR integration.
UK CAA AOC registry validation at bind. External CAA API integration required -- GW Cloud has no native aviation authority integration.
War risk premium loading by route/destination. Custom rating table by ICAO region -- straightforward migration to GW Cloud rating tables.

cloudMapping.action: Custom EC785 minimum limit calculation rule required -- SDR conversion feed needed
CAA AOC registry validation -- new external API integration
Generic compliance field -- Montreal Convention-specific rules need migration
